Video.summary: Ken Whiting travels to Juneau, Alaska to paddle with whales, bears, glaciers and icebergs on a multi-day sea kayaking adventure.
Video.title: Paddling Juneau, Alaska

Video.summary: Jaunt through Zion National Park.
Video.title: Viva Adventure! - Las Vegas, Nevada

Video.summary: From vintage planes to miniature trains, adventure comes in all sizes, just a short drive from New York City.
Video.title: Beyond The Big Apple - New York, New York

Image.alt: Beyond The Big Apple - New York, New York
Beyond The Big Apple - New York, New York
Beyond The Big Apple - New York, New York

Video.summary: Orlando can be a gateway to all sorts of surprising adventures.
Video.title: Sunshine State of Mind - Orlando, Florida

Image.alt: Sunshine State of Mind - Orlando, Florida
Sunshine State of Mind - Orlando, Florida
Sunshine State of Mind - Orlando, Florida

Video.summary: Relive the golden age of Hollywood.
Video.title: From the Valley to the Mountains - Los Angeles, California

Image.alt: From the Valley to the Mountains - Los Angeles, California
From the Valley to the Mountains - Los Angeles, California
From the Valley to the Mountains - Los Angeles, California

Video.summary: Singer/songwriter Summer Dean visits her college stomping grounds and discovers it offers more music history than Buddy Holly. Punk rock drummer Phanie Diaz checks out local art in San Antonio and rapper Lou Charles.
Video.title: Discovering Home

Video.summary: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land.
Video.grandparentTitle: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
Video.title: Bowdoin, Maine

Video.summary: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat’s cheese in the heart of Virginia’s Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat…
Video.grandparentTitle: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
Video.title: Lexington, Virginia

Video.summary: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke set out to meet local singles in outdoorsy Denver, Colorado.
Video.title: United Dates of America: Denver

Video.summary: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke head south to meet local singles in young and vibrant Charlotte, North Carolina.
Video.title: United Dates of America: Charlotte

Video.summary: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke try their luck dating in artsy Providence, Rhode Island.
Video.title: United Dates of America: Providence

Video.summary: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city’s heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There’s this ‘all senses on overload’ side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim kicks off his journey in Virginia Beach, a coastal gem with a deep-rooted fishing heritage. But Mother Nature has her own plans—as storm clouds roll in, Jim has a challenge ahead: tagging his first Redfish for NOAA to help track its migration.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Mother Nature along the Mother Road. Check out these can’t miss natural wonders on Route 66.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Sink your teeth into these delicious bites from snacks to five star dining on Route 66.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Place is inextricably linked to who we are as human beings. See the American Great Outdoors in its purest and most authentic light – through the eyes of locals.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF’s Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly’s ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky’s own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly’s horse wins the race. At Louisville’s Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Eric Hanson explores the mountains, trails and winter landscapes of West Virginia.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Danny and Mara try their luck in the Flip Side of Florida, Jacksonville.
Video.title: Lucky in Love: Jacksonville

Video.summary: Mexican couple Gaby and Miguel embark on a journey of discovery, luck and love in sunny San Diego.
Video.title: Lucky in Love: San Diego

Video.summary: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America’s most legendary outdoor playgrounds.
Video.title: National Parks Adventure

Video.summary: The Ellis Family explores Washington D.C., discovering monuments, Ford’s Theatre, and the best cupcakes in the capital!
Video.title: Ellis Family Vacation: Washington D.C.

Video.summary: The Ellis Family road trips to the Grand Canyon and Zion National Park in search of some outdoor fun.
Video.title: Ellis Family Vacation: Grand Canyon

Video.summary: The Ellis Family ventures to the Big Easy, soaking up the culture of New Orleans with jazz, beignets, airboat adventures, and more.
Video.title: Ellis Family Vacation: New Orleans

Video.summary: The Ellis Family checks out Birmingham, Alabama, ground zero of the Civil Rights Movement, visiting museums, monuments, and locations that helped end segregation in the United States.
Video.title: Ellis Family Vacation: Birmingham

Video.summary: Dive into the fun blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.
Video.title: Beach Battles: Key West & Wrightsville

Video.summary: High-octane dune racing in Winchester Bay, Oregon, plus high-flying Kitefest fun in Long Beach, Washington.
Video.title: Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach

Image.alt: Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach
Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach
Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach

Video.summary: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.
Video.title: Small Town Big Story: Where Lobster Is Always On the Menu - Rockland, ME

Image.alt: Small Town Big Story: Where Lobster Is Always On the Menu - Rockland, ME
Small Town Big Story: Where Lobster Is Always On the Menu - Rockland, ME
Small Town Big Story: Where Lobster Is Always On the Menu - Rockland, ME
Small Town Big Story: Where Lobster Is Always On the Menu - Rockland, ME
Small Town Big Story: Where Lobster Is Always On the Menu - Rockland, ME
Small Town Big Story: Where Lobster Is Always On the Menu - Rockland, ME

Video.summary: Jim lands in Maine to meet the faces behind one of the top seafood scenes in the U.S. From Portland to North Haven, it’s all about experiencing true coastal life from the Mainers' point of view. Jim then checks off a bucket list moment: smallmouth fishing on the legendary Grand Lake.
Video.title: Maine

Video.summary: Travel along the West to some of the most colorful roads, delicious food, magnificent scenery, magic moments, and fascinating people all along the way.
Video.title: Roadfood Adventures USA: West

Video.summary: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!
Video.title: FOUR CORNERS: ARIZONA

Video.summary: For this episode, Ben’s planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?
Video.title: FOUR CORNERS: UTAH

Video.summary: Lou hooks up with keyboardist Patric Johnston while Summer records an original song at a legendary recording studio. Phanie learns about the multicultural history of the accordion aka Texas squeezebox.
Video.title: Innovations

Video.summary: Phanie gets a lesson in the bajo sexto, a 12-stringed guitar, while Lou meets the owner of Houston’s independent record shop Vinal Edge. Summer tries her hand at graffiti art.
Video.title: History Inspires

Video.summary: Summer jams with Nathen Rogers and his band, La Croix Boix. Lou gets a tour of Sugarhill Recording Studio and Phanie’s punk band plays alongside the accordion-powered Tex Mex band Pińata Protest.
Video.title: The Scene

Video.summary: The Twin Cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul, while distinct in character, share a deep appreciation for music and cultural diversity. Chunz and Makh set out to discover the sounds and messages of unity emerging in the African community with traditional performer Christian Adeti and dive into a new genre of Somali rap with rapper DJ Fawzi. With it’s vibrant modern culture and rich musical history, The Twin Cities are a special destination you won’t want to miss.
Video.title: American Beats: Traditional African Music

Video.summary: Surfers hire the Ewings to cater dinner on a secluded beach in Kodiak, but hurricane force winds could mean disaster.
Video.title: Alaskas Wild Gourmet: Surfer's Delight

Video.summary: We bring our imagination to life and sculpt a turtle-themed masterpiece at America's biggest native sand sculpture competition.
Video.title: Texas SandFest

Video.summary: What better setting for a chef vs chef food challenge than Portland, Oregon?
Video.title: 2 Chefs. 6 Food Challenges.

Video.summary: When you're told you have to eat burnt ends in Kansas City... you 100% must... Phenomenal doesn't even begin to describe them.
Video.title: This BBQ Changes EVERYTHING!

Video.summary: The Ewing family give back to Kodiak Veterans by serving them a five star gourmet meal in the Alaskan wilderness.
Video.title: Alaskas Wild Gourmet: Family Affair

Video.summary: Chunz and Makh visit Lafayette, Louisiana where they take a deep dive into Zydeco music and local crawfish with Grammy-winning musician Chubby.
Video.title: Zydeco

Video.summary: While visiting St. Louis, Missouri, Chunz and Makh explore the soulful Blues community and take a turn jookin’ and ballroomin’ dancing.
Video.title: Blues

Video.summary: Chunz and Makh discover Appalachian Mountain Music and clogging in the Blue Ridge mountains of Asheville, North Carolina.
Video.title: Appalachian Music

Video.summary: See some of the best playgrounds in the USA through the lens of athletes.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From beaches to bike trails to breweries, the United States has something for everyone to explore. Hear from the locals themselves and discover the best places to eat, shop, play, and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Seasoned travel writer Jonathan Thompson sets out to explore the adventurous sides of Dallas, Texas and Pensacola, Florida.
Video.title: Episode 1
